title: Alya Kujou
description: A Fanmade Pack By Ray Senpai 🌟
body:
Alya 16x Texture Pack
by Ray Senpai

• Custom UI & GUI

• Custom Low Fire

• Custom Ender Pearl

• Custom Golden Apple

• No Explosion Particles

• No Eating Particles

• Custom Items

Clean. Smooth. Competitive.

If you don’t download Alya 16x, you’re missing a next-level Minecraft experience.

Perfect for PvP.
Perfect for Anime lovers.
Perfect for Clean gameplay.

🔥 Made by Ray Senpai/Aki Senpai
📺 YouTube: Shadow Ray Senpai

Download now — don’t be the one who skips this pack.
